# STRAT.010 ? Growth Mindset (Dweck)

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** strategic_frameworks
**Subcategory:** parenting_educational
**Domain:** PARENTING_EDUCATIONAL
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Intelligence malleable; effort over talent; challenges as growth; failure as learning; process praise; yet power

## Application
Praise effort not ability; embrace challenges; reframe failure as learning; focus on process; believe in development; use 'yet' language

## Key Values
- Malleability
- Effort praise
- Challenge embrace
- Learning from failure
- Development belief

## Tags
philosophy, strategic-framework, parenting_educational

## Notes
Strategic framework ingested into philosophy library per operator mapping rule.
